articles.author: Omar Sohail
articles.title: Huawei’s HarmonyOS Can Be Further Optimized To Run On 64KB RAM While Running On A Single Dry Cell Battery For A Year, Says Executive Director - Wccftech
articles.description: At the Huawei Developer Conference 2026, an executive makes a bold claim stating that the HarmonyOS platform can be optimized to run on 64KB of RAM
articles.content: The U.S. ban hammer pushed Huawei into a corner, and with no way to run Android on its devices, the company that was once poised to become the largest smartphone manufacturer in the world was now lim… [+1884 chars]
